name_en: 24P New CHANEL | Every one is super amazing. Every handbag is crafted like a piece of art, whether it's the soft violet or the classic black, exuding different charms. The elegant yet stylish shape, like the refinement and elegance of a lady~ The combination of gold chain and leather reveals a sense of high-class~ The 24P quarter is simply a killer combo. Model AS4740. Dimensions 15.5-23-8.5. Full set packaging
